summary: This is an extremely brief follow-up post where Shapiro shares a Flickr link he accidentally omitted from a previous post about a walk-in closet project. The post is essentially a correction/addendum with no substantive content beyond the link itself.
key_points: Follow-up post correcting an omission from a previous 'walk-in closet' post
Links to a Flickr photo set documenting what appears to be a closet project
key_insight: This is a trivial correction post with no substantive content to analyze.
